narration: Ever heard of cities built by bacteria? They’re called biofilms.

ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever heard of cities built by bacteria? They’re called biofilms.

narration: These slimy structures can protect bacteria from our immune system and antibiotics.

ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These slimy structures can protect bacteria from our immune system and antibiotics.

narration: Imagine a fortress where bacteria thrive, making infections harder to treat.

narration: Studies show that biofilms can lead to chronic infections, resisting many antibiotics.

narration: Understanding biofilms is key to developing new treatments against stubborn infections.
